ai_decision_logs.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
FOREIGN KEY (raw_import_id) REFERENCES raw_imports(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

card_embeddings.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

card_interaction_outcomes.definition: CHECK ((((price_amount IS NULL) AND (price_currency IS NULL)) OR ((price_amount IS NOT NULL) AND (price_currency IS NOT NULL))))
CHECK (((price_currency IS NULL) OR ((price_currency = upper(price_currency)) AND (char_length(price_currency) = 3))))

card_interactions.definition: FOREIGN KEY (receiver_user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (sender_user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

card_price_observations.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

card_price_rollups.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

card_price_ticks.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

card_prices.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

card_print_file_paths.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

card_print_identity.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

card_print_price_curves.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

card_print_traits.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

card_printings.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT
FOREIGN KEY (finish_key) REFERENCES finish_keys(key) ON DELETE RESTRICT

card_prints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (game_id) REFERENCES games(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (set_id) REFERENCES sets(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

card_signals.definition: FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

ebay_active_price_snapshots.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

ebay_active_prices_latest.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

external_discovery_candidates.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
FOREIGN KEY (raw_import_id) REFERENCES raw_imports(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

CHECK ((((match_status = 'RESOLVED'::text) AND (resolved_set_code IS NOT NULL) AND (card_print_id IS NOT NULL)) OR ((match_status = ANY (ARRAY['UNMATCHED'::text, 'AMBIGUOUS'::text])) AND (resolved_set_code IS NULL) AND (card_print_id IS NULL))))

external_mappings.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

justtcg_identity_overrides.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

listings.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) NOT VALID
FOREIGN KEY (owner_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) NOT VALID
FOREIGN KEY (vault_item_id) REFERENCES vault_items(id) NOT VALID

pricing_jobs.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

pricing_observations.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

slab_provenance_events.definition: CHECK (((source_event_key IS NULL) OR ((event_source IS NOT NULL) AND (btrim(event_source) <> ''::text))))

user_card_photos.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_print_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

vault_item_instances.definition: CHECK (((asking_price_currency IS NULL) OR ((asking_price_currency = upper(asking_price_currency)) AND (char_length(asking_price_currency) = 3))))
CHECK (((gv_vi_id IS NULL) OR ((btrim(gv_vi_id) <> ''::text) AND (gv_vi_id = upper(btrim(gv_vi_id))))))
CHECK (((((card_print_id IS NOT NULL))::integer + ((slab_cert_id IS NOT NULL))::integer) = 1))

CHECK ((((pricing_mode = 'market'::text) AND (asking_price_amount IS NULL) AND (asking_price_currency IS NULL) AND (asking_price_note IS NULL)) OR ((pricing_mode = 'asking'::text) AND (asking_price_amount IS NOT NULL) AND (asking_price_currency IS NOT NULL))))
FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

vault_items.definition: FOREIGN KEY (card_id) REFERENCES card_prints(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

vault_items.indexdef: CREATE INDEX idx_vault_items_active_user_created ON public.vault_items USING btree (user_id, created_at DESC) WHERE (archived_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_vault_items_intent_active ON public.vault_items USING btree (intent) WHERE (archived_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_vault_items_user_archived_at ON public.vault_items USING btree (user_id, archived_at)
CREATE INDEX idx_vault_items_user_created ON public.vault_items USING btree (user_id, created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_vault_items_user_name ON public.vault_items USING btree (user_id, name)
CREATE INDEX vault_items_card_id_idx ON public.vault_items USING btree (card_id)
CREATE INDEX vault_items_card_idx ON public.vault_items USING btree (card_id)
CREATE INDEX vault_items_created_idx ON public.vault_items USING btree (created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX vault_items_gv_id_idx ON public.vault_items USING btree (gv_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX vault_items_pkey ON public.vault_items USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX vault_items_user_created_idx ON public.vault_items USING btree (user_id, created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX vault_items_user_idx ON public.vault_items USING btree (user_id)
